report.summary: Researched Hyperliquid HIP-3 permissionless tokenized futures ($1.2B OI milestone, March 10 2026), wrote a 3,200-word learn guide with interactive position/funding calculator, full SEO optimization with Article+FAQ+HowTo schemas, and scaffolded the page at /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide into PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Hyperliquid HIP-3 permissionless futures market hit $1.2B open interest on March 10, 2026 — driven primarily by commodity and equity contracts, not crypto.
CL-USDC (WTI Crude Oil) is the largest market by volume: $1.62B in 24h as of March 10. XYZ100-USDC (US equity index) is second.
Market creation requires staking 500,000 HYPE tokens (~$9M), serving as both spam-deterrent and slashable security deposit.
pmUSDH launched March 15, 2026 by Native Markets: yield-bearing ERC-20 collateral that earns lending interest while backing portfolio margin positions.
Portfolio margin enables cross-asset hedging (e.g., long crypto perps + short XYZ100) and carry trades within a single collateral account.

Existing degen0x content covers Hyperliquid generally (hyperliquid-guide) and perp DEXs (best-perpetual-dex-guide), but HIP-3's permissionless tokenized assets were not yet covered — clear content gap to fill.
Key regulatory context: CFTC-SEC MOU signed March 11, 2026 with a Joint Harmonization Initiative on DeFi; CFTC guidance on non-custodial DeFi software in progress.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Full 3,200-word learn guide: 'Hyperliquid HIP-3: How to Trade Oil, Stocks & Commodities On-Chain in 2026'

9 sections: What Is HIP-3, What Can You Trade, How It Works (oracles, collateral, funding), Portfolio Margin & pmUSDH, Step-by-Step Trade Guide, Trading Strategies, Risks, HIP-3 vs TradFi comparison table, FAQ (6 questions)

Interactive Hip3FundingCalculator component: market selector (5 markets), long/short direction, collateral + leverage inputs, funding rate override, position summary (size, liq price, liq distance), funding cost/income breakdown (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly), annualized funding rate, high-leverage risk warnings
Prose calibrated to intermediate/degen audience — specific numbers, real protocol names (pmUSDH, USDH, Native Markets, Felix, Hyperlend, Pendle), honest risk disclosures

pages.notes: Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts. TypeScript check passed with no errors.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title: 'Hyperliquid HIP-3 Tokenized Futures Guide 2026 | degen0x' — 55 chars, primary keyword first
Meta description: 140 chars, includes primary keyword, key stats ($1.2B OI), unique value props (no KYC, 24/7)
Target keywords: 'Hyperliquid HIP-3', 'tokenized futures', 'trade oil crypto', 'on-chain commodity trading', 'permissionless perpetuals'
OpenGraph article with publishedTime, modifiedTime, authors — optimized for social sharing
Twitter large card configured
Article schema (JSON-LD) — title, description, datePublished, author, wordCount: 3200
FAQ schema (JSON-LD) — 6 questions targeting 'People Also Ask' placements
HowTo schema (JSON-LD) — 6 steps for 'How to Trade Oil on Hyperliquid HIP-3'
5 internal links: /learn/hyperliquid-guide, /learn/perpetual-futures-guide, /learn/best-perpetual-dex-guide, /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide, /learn/real-world-assets-rwa-guide
Table of Contents with 9 anchor links for crawlability and jump navigation

sections.title: Components Built
items: Hip3FundingCalculator.tsx — fully client-side interactive calculator
Markets: CL-USDC (oil), XYZ100-USDC (equity index), GC-USDC (gold), SI-USDC (silver), TSLA-USDC (single stock)

Features: position size calculation, liquidation price estimator, hourly/daily/weekly/monthly funding cost breakdown, annualized rate display, high-risk warnings for leverage >= 10x or liq distance < 10%
Zero external dependencies — pure React state + inline SVG; follows existing codebase patterns
